name: Jingle Bells Chocolate Pretzels
recipeInstructions:
Cover tray with wax paper. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine chocolate chips, vanilla milk chips, and shortening. Microwave at HIGH for 1 minute; stir. Microwave an additional 1 to 2 minutes, stirring every 30 seconds until the mixture is melted when stirred. Stir vigorously until smooth.
Dip each pretzel into the chocolate mixture, tapping the fork on the side of the bowl to remove excess. Place coated pretzels on the prepared tray. In a small microwave-safe bowl, combine remaining vanilla milk chips and shortening. Microwave at HIGH for 15 to 30 seconds or until melted when stirred with a whisk.
Using tines of a fork, drizzle across the pretzels. Refrigerate until chocolate is set. Store in an airtight container in a cool, dry place.
WHITE DIPPED PRETZELS: Prepare tray as directed above. In a medium microwave-safe bowl, combine 1-2/3 cups (10-oz. pkg.) Premier White Chips and 2 tablespoons shortening. Microwave at HIGH for 1 to 2 minutes or until melted when stirred with a whisk.
Dip pretzels as directed above. In a small microwave-safe bowl, combine 1/4 cup Semi-Sweet Chocolate Chips and 1/4 teaspoon shortening. Microwave at HIGH for 30 seconds to 1 minute or until melted when stirred. Using tines of a fork, drizzle across the pretzels.
Refrigerate and store as directed above.
